label: Online application opens
description: Registration and application form go live on cee.kerala.gov.in. Pay the application fee in the same session.

label: Last date for online application + fee
description: Submission and fee payment close at 5:00 PM. Do not wait until the last day. The portal slows down near deadlines.

label: Last date to upload supporting documents
description: Upload qualifying mark list, NATA Score Card, nativity, community, income, and PD certificates as applicable. Late uploads are not considered for rank list preparation.

label: NATA score upload window
description: Upload your NATA 2025 or NATA 2026 scorecard. CEE will publish a separate notification with the cut-off date for accepting NATA scores.
display_date: Per CEE notification (NATA 2025 or 2026 score required)

label: Architecture rank list publication
description: Separate B.Arch rank list, prepared by adding NATA marks (out of 200) to qualifying exam marks (out of 200), is published on cee.kerala.gov.in.
display_date: On or before 20 Jun 2026 (per CEE notification)

label: Trial Allotment
description: A non-binding mock allotment to help candidates fine-tune their option list before Phase 1.

label: CAP Phase 1 Allotment
description: First binding allotment based on rank, category, and registered options. Fee remittance and reporting follow within the deadline.

label: CAP Phase 2 Allotment
description: Second allotment to fill vacant seats and process upward movement. Re-arrange options before Phase 2 starts.

label: Mop-up / Spot Allotment
description: Final round to fill any remaining seats. Spot allotment may run college-wise. Final phase fee liability rules apply.
